summary: Complete competitive research and website generation brief for Carter Electrical Contracting (carterelec.co.uk). Part 1 contains the original top-5 UK commercial electrician analysis with scored selection algorithm and answers to the 5 pre-build website questions. Part 2 contains a full brand scrape of the existing carterelectricalcontracting.co.uk site (logo, colours, typography, tone, services, case studies, contact details) and a ready-to-use ~500-word prompt for Gemini covering: company context, target visitors (commercial-first), primary keyword (electricians chester), CTA strategy, objections to address, design direction using Carter's existing lime green/charcoal palette, full 10-page site structure, and brand assets inventory.
